creator: lenzi.sergio@gmail.com
text:
last port www/chromium does not compile with option pulseaudio set

the compilation gives and error:
../../media/audio/pulse/pulse_output.cc:67:21: error: no member named GetGlobalAppName' in 'media::AudioManager'
      AudioManager::GetGlobalAppName(), &StreamNotifyCallback,
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
1 error generated.
[7398/18197] CXX obj/media/audio/media.virtual_audio_input_stream.ovninja: build stopped: subcommand failed.
